---
title: "persistReactiveCollection()"
description: "D161 graph-bound sidecar over an existing collection. It writes passive storage frames and exposes adapter progress as graph-visible DATA facts; it never restores or mutates the collection."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

D161 graph-bound sidecar over an existing collection. It writes passive storage frames and
exposes adapter progress as graph-visible DATA facts; it never restores or mutates the collection.

## Import

```ts
import { persistReactiveCollection } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function persistReactiveCollection(
	graph: Graph,
	collection: PersistableCollection<T, K>,
	opts: PersistReactiveCollectionOptions<K>,
): ReactiveCollectionPersistenceHandle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `collection` | `PersistableCollection<T, K>` | collection value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `PersistReactiveCollectionOptions<K>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ReactiveCollectionPersistenceHandle` value.

## Example

```ts
import { persistReactiveCollection } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/reactive-collection-storage.ts`
